home.title: Logo Library
home.description: A collection of logos for Libyan banks and payment methods. Available in mono, branded, and logomark variants.

apps.title: App UI Gallery
apps.description: Explore user interface patterns from real Libyan applications. Curated screenshots for research and inspiration.

contributors.followLine2: save us so we can make you a better
contributors.contributeDescription: Join our growing community of contributors and help build the most comprehensive fintech UI resource in Libya.

team.title: Meet the Team
team.subtitle: The people behind Khazna, building Libya's fintech design resource.

sara.name: Sara Shemisa
sara.quote: Design is about solving real problems. Khazna gives Libyan developers a head start with polished, ready-to-use patterns.

mosab.name: Mosab Omaer
mosab.quote: We built Khazna to bridge the gap between design and development in Libya's growing fintech ecosystem.

moaad.name: Moaad Elhuni
moaad.quote: Great products start with great design systems. Khazna is our contribution to the Libyan tech community.

about.title: Building Libya's design infrastructure, together.
about.description: Khazna is an open-source resource library for Libyan fintech — logos, UI patterns, and app screenshots, all in one place. We built it because designers and developers in Libya kept starting from scratch when they needed bank assets or wanted to research how local apps look.
about.description2: Everything here is free, community-maintained, and made to save you time. Whether you're a designer looking for references, a developer needing brand assets, or a researcher studying the local fintech landscape — this is for you.
